title: Scalable
description: Scale each element of the GUI individually!
body:
Allows you to scale each element of the GUI indivudually, including:

- Containers (the inventory, chests, etc)
- Player tab
- Chat
- Titles

The rest of the GUI elements, such as your hotbar or the scoreboard, are still controlled by the global toggle. You configure these through the Sodium options menu.

![options menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/623999be6a40df64d263bda6bc273b17ba6f6bd9_0.webp)

Requires [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config). Make sure to download a version of Sodium over above 0.8.9 as any version below that is incompatible with modern versions of the Fabric API.
